title: HumanUniqueness proofs go stale instantly — no root history buffer

artifacts.description: Add `humanRootHistory[30]` ring buffer storage, a `humanRootHistoryIndex` pointer, push current root into the buffer inside `enrollHuman()`, and replace the `humanTree._root()` point-in-time check inside `verifyHandshake()` with a loop over the 30-slot buffer.

Hardhat tests covering: (1) proof generated before enrollment still verifies within window, (2) proof older than 30 enrollments is correctly rejected, (3) ring wrap-around at slot 30, (4) simultaneous human + agent enrollment does not corrupt either ring, (5) front-run simulation — second enrollment between proof generation and verifyHandshake call still succeeds.
Document the 30-root history window for humanTree root acceptance, matching the existing agentTree window language. Note that the window is enrollment-count-based, not time-based.
Update the liveness / DoS threat row for HumanUniqueness to mark it mitigated via history buffer; cite the enrollment-count window and its trade-offs.

steps: Read contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol to locate agentRootHistory ring buffer pattern (storage layout, push logic in enroll, loop check in verify).

Mirror the pattern: add `bytes32[30] private humanRootHistory` and `uint256 private humanRootHistoryIndex` storage variables immediately after the agentTree equivalents to keep storage slot ordering stable.
In `enrollHuman()`: after `humanTree.insert(leaf)` succeeds, store the new root — `humanRootHistory[humanRootHistoryIndex % 30] = humanTree._root(); humanRootHistoryIndex++;`
Seed the buffer at deploy time (or first enrollment): if `humanRootHistoryIndex == 0` pre-insert, push the initial empty root so slot 0 is valid before any proof can be generated.

In `verifyHandshake()`: replace the single equality check `require(proof.humanMerkleRoot == humanTree._root())` with a loop across all 30 slots, reverting only if none match — use a local `bool found` flag to avoid repeated SLOADs.
Gas-profile the 30-iteration loop against the baseline single-root check; add a NatSpec note with the worst-case gas delta so integrators can size their gas limits.
Write the Hardhat test file covering all five scenarios listed in the test artifact, including the front-run simulation using `evm_snapshot` / `evm_revert` to bracket the enrollment transaction.
Update spec/did-method-bolyra.md to document the acceptance window semantics (enrollment-count-based, not time-based).
Run `npm run test:contracts` and confirm all existing tests pass plus new tests pass.
Commit with DCO sign-off: `git commit -s -m 'fix: add humanRootHistory[30] ring buffer to IdentityRegistry'`
dependencies: contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol — agentRootHistory pattern must be read before mirroring
IncrementalMerkleTree library — confirm _root() returns the post-insert root synchronously
Hardhat test suite — existing verifyHandshake integration tests must remain green after the loop replacement
